articles.title: Women Wanted: Kalshi Pushes to Expand Far Beyond Sport Bets
articles.summary: Kalshi is actively recruiting women to diversify its user base beyond the male-dominated sports betting crowd. The push signals prediction markets are maturing from niche gambling into mainstream financial tools that need broader demographics to scale and attract institutional money.

articles.title: Trump is the GOAT in swaying GOP races — and prediction markets say he’ll decide Texas this way
articles.summary: Trump's endorsement track record in Republican primaries has been nearly flawless, and prediction markets are betting he'll swing the Texas GOP races decisively in favor of his picks. When the most successful kingmaker in modern politics weighs in on contested primaries, smart money follows his lead because his backing has become the single strongest predictor of Republican primary outcomes.

articles.title: Genius looking to join dots between M&A and prediction markets growth
articles.summary: Someone's building connections between merger and acquisition activity and the expanding prediction markets industry. If they crack this code, we could see prediction markets become the go-to tool for pricing deal risk and timing corporate moves before they hit the headlines.

articles.title: The Bettors on Polymarket Don't Think Bitcoin Will Hit $150,000 in March. Here's What I Think.
articles.summary: Polymarket traders are betting against Bitcoin reaching $150,000 by March, suggesting most view the crypto's recent rally as overextended. The market's skepticism creates a clear contrarian setup where either the crowd gets validated or someone makes serious money fading the consensus.

articles.title: Insider Trading Is Going to Get People Killed
articles.summary: Stock traders are increasingly using non-public information from defense contractors and government sources to bet on geopolitical events, turning classified intel into market alpha. When prediction markets start pricing in military strikes or diplomatic moves before they happen, governments will crack down hard on both the traders and the platforms that enable them.

articles.title: Bitcoin Needs a Monster Rally to Hit $150,000 by December -- and Prediction Markets See Only an 11% Shot
articles.summary: Bitcoin would need to surge roughly 60% from current levels to reach $150,000 by year-end, but prediction markets are pricing in just an 11% probability of that happening. The massive gap between what Bitcoin bulls hope for and what bettors actually think will happen shows how prediction markets cut through the crypto hype to reveal what smart money really believes.

articles.title: Exclusive | Kalshi and Polymarket Are Each Eyeing Roughly $20 Billion Valuations
articles.summary: Kalshi and Polymarket are both targeting valuations around $20 billion as they seek new funding rounds. These astronomical numbers signal that Wall Street and Silicon Valley now see prediction markets as a legitimate multi-billion dollar industry rather than a niche betting curiosity.

articles.title: Popular prediction markets take heat from lawmakers
articles.summary: Congressional lawmakers are ramping up scrutiny of major prediction markets, likely targeting platforms like Polymarket and Kalshi over regulatory concerns. The political pressure could trigger new restrictions or force these platforms to drastically change how they operate, potentially limiting what Americans can bet on.

articles.title: Prediction markets are a national security threat
articles.summary: Someone's arguing that prediction markets pose risks to America's safety and stability, probably because they could leak classified info or manipulate public opinion during crises. If this narrative gains traction with regulators, we could see new restrictions that make it harder to bet on geopolitical events or military outcomes.

articles.title: The prediction market backlash has arrived
articles.summary: Critics are finally pushing back hard against prediction markets after years of hype and mainstream adoption. The timing couldn't be worse for platforms trying to go legit, as regulatory scrutiny and public skepticism could kill the momentum that's been building since 2020.

articles.title: Precision-Guided Predictions: Intelligence Risk in Prediction Markets
articles.summary: Prediction markets face growing scrutiny over whether sophisticated traders with inside information or advanced analytical capabilities create unfair advantages that undermine market integrity. If regulators decide these "precision-guided" bets constitute market manipulation or insider trading, it could trigger oversight that fundamentally changes how prediction markets operate and who can participate.

articles.title: Pa. lawmaker proposes regulating prediction markets in Pennsylvania
articles.summary: A Pennsylvania legislator wants to create a regulatory framework for prediction markets operating in the state. If it passes, Pennsylvania could become another key battleground for legal prediction market expansion, potentially opening up a massive market that other platforms have struggled to access.
